lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਸਾਜੇ ਥਾਪਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਤਿਸੈ ਭਾਣਾ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aap saaje thaap vekhai tisai bhaanaa bhaaeaa |
lines.english: He Himself creates, establishes and beholds all, by the Pleasure of His Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨ ਰਾਂਗਿ ਰੰਗੀਲੜੇ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਲੁ ਬਣਾਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: saajan raang rangeelarre rang laal banaaeaa |5|
lines.english: My friends are happy in the Love of the Lord; they nurture love for their Beloved. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਪੁੰਨ ਪੂਜਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: atthasatth teerath pun poojaa naam saachaa bhaaeaa |
lines.english: The sixty-eight holy places of pilgrimage, charity and worship, are found in the love of the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧਾ ਆਗੂ ਜੇ ਥੀਐ ਕਿਉ ਪਾਧਰੁ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: andhaa aagoo je theeai kiau paadhar jaanai |
lines.english: If a blind man is made the leader, how will he know the way?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਮੁਸੈ ਮਤਿ ਹੋਛੀਐ ਕਿਉ ਰਾਹੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: aap musai mat hochheeai kiau raahu pachhaanai |
lines.english: He is impaired, and his understanding is inadequate; how will he know the way?

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਮ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਕਛੁ ਨ ਸੂਝੈ ਅੰਧੁ ਬੂਡੌ ਧੰਧਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: vin naam har ke kachh na soojhai andh booddau dhandhalee |
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, they cannot see anything; the blind are drowned in worldly entanglements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਰਾਹਿ ਜਾਵੈ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਅੰਧ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਅੰਧਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: kiau raeh jaavai mehal paavai andh kee mat andhalee |
lines.english: How can he follow the path and reach the Mansion of the Lord's Presence? Blind is the understanding of the blind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਹਿ ਕਰਿ ਬਿਨੰਤੀ ਰਾਹੁ ਪਾਧਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਦਸੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: kar jorr gur peh kar binantee raahu paadhar gur dasai |6|
lines.english: With your palms pressed together, pray to the Guru to show you the way. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਚਾਉ ਉਪਜੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: din raat chaanan chaau upajai sabad gur kaa man vasai |
lines.english: Day and night, the Divine Light shines forth and joy wells up, when the Word of the Guru's Shabad abides in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸੁ ਪਹਿ ਖੋਲੑਉ ਗੰਠੜੀ ਦੂਖੀ ਭਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kis peh kholau ganttharree dookhee bhar aaeaa |
lines.english: Unto whom should I tie up and give the bundle of my pains?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਪਰਦੇਸੀ ਜੇ ਥੀਐ ਸਭੁ ਦੇਸੁ ਪਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: man paradesee je theeai sabh des paraaeaa |
lines.english: If the man becomes a stranger to God, then all the world becomes a stranger to him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣੇ ਜਾਵਣੇ ਖਰੇ ਡਰਾਵਣੇ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਫੇਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: aavane jaavane khare ddaraavane tott na aavai fereea |
lines.english: Comings and goings are terrible and dreadful; there is no end to the rounds of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੀ ਭਰਿ ਆਇਆ ਜਗਤੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ਕਉਣੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਬਿਧਿ ਮੇਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: dookhee bhar aaeaa jagat sabaaeaa kaun jaanai bidh mereea |
lines.english: The whole world is overflowing with pain and suffering; who can know the state of my inner self?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਪਰਦੇਸੀ ਜੇ ਥੀਐ ਸਭੁ ਦੇਸੁ ਪਰਾਇਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: man paradesee je theeai sabh des paraaeaa |7|
lines.english: If the mind becomes a stranger to God, then all the world becomes a stranger to him. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਵਿਹੂਣੇ ਊਣੇ ਝੂਣੇ ਨਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naam vihoone aoone jhoone naa gur sabad sunaaeaa |
lines.english: Without the Naam, he is vacant and sad; he does not listen to the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਹਲੀ ਘਰਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਸੋ ਭਰਪੁਰਿ ਲੀਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur mahalee ghar aapanai so bharapur leenaa |
lines.english: One who finds the Guru's Mansion within the home of his own being, merges in the All-pervading Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕੁ ਸੇਵਾ ਤਾਂ ਕਰੇ ਸਚ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਤੀਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sevak sevaa taan kare sach sabad pateenaa |
lines.english: The sevadar performs selfless service when he is pleased, and confirmed in the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਪਤੀਜੈ ਅੰਕੁ ਭੀਜੈ ਸੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ਅੰਤਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sabade pateejai ank bheejai su mehal mahalaa antare |
lines.english: Confirmed in the Shabad, with her being softened by devotion, the bride dwells in the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, deep within her being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੋਈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਨਿਰੰਤਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aap karataa kare soee prabh aap ant nirantare |
lines.english: The Creator Himself creates; God Himself, in the end, is endless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਹਲੀ ਘਰਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਸੋ ਭਰਿਪੁਰਿ ਲੀਣਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: gur mahalee ghar aapanai so bharipur leenaa |8|
lines.english: One who finds the Guru's Mansion within the home of his own being, merges in the All-pervading Lord. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਮੇਲਾ ਤਾਂ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ ਬਾਜੰਤ ਅਨਹਦ ਬੀਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur sabad melaa taan suhelaa baajant anahad beenaa |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the mortal is united, and then embellished; the unstruck melody of the sound current resounds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤਾ ਕਿਆ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: keetaa kiaa saalaaheeai kar vekhai soee |
lines.english: Why praise that which is created? Praise instead the One who created it and watches over it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਜੇ ਲੋਚੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee keemat naa pavai je lochai koee |
lines.english: His value cannot be estimated, no matter how much one may wish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈ ਜੈ ਕਾਰੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਹਿ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਅਮੁਲਏ ॥
lines.translit: jai jai kaar kareh tudh bhaaveh gur kai sabad amule |
lines.english: He alone celebrates victory, who is pleasing to You, through the Invaluable Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਸੋ ਪਾਵੈ ਆਪਿ ਜਾਣਾਵੈ ਆਪਿ ਅਭੁਲੁ ਨ ਭੁਲਏ ॥
lines.translit: keemat so paavai aap jaanaavai aap abhul na bhule |
lines.english: He alone can estimate the Lord's value, whom the Lord Himself causes to know. He is not mistaken; He does not make mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਦੇਵੈ ਮਤਿ ਸਾਈ ॥੯॥੨॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak jin kar dekhiaa devai mat saaee |9|2|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, the One who created the creation, watches over it; He alone bestows understanding. ||9||2||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੀਣਉ ਨੀਚੁ ਕਰਉ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਸਾਚੁ ਨ ਛੋਡਉ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: heenau neech krau benantee saach na chhoddau bhaaee |
lines.english: I am lowly and abject - I offer my prayer; may I never forsake the True Name, O Sibling of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਛੰਤ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: raag soohee chhant mahalaa 3 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Raag Soohee, Chhant, Third Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਸੋਹਿਲੜਾ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: sukh sohilarraa har dhiaavahu |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord, and find peace and pleasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਦੂਖ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh fal paavahu har naam dhiaavahu janam janam ke dookh nivaare |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, obtain the fruit of the Lord, and meditate on the Lord's Name; the pains of countless lifetimes shall be erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh har fal paavahu |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, obtain the Lord's fruitful rewards.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਅਪਣੇ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਕਾਰਜ ਸਭਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: balihaaree gur apane vittahu jin kaaraj sabh savaare |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my Guru, who has arranged and resolved all my affairs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਪਹੁ ਸੁਖ ਫਲ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਪਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: har prabh kripaa kare har jaapahu sukh fal har jan paavahu |
lines.english: The Lord God will bestow His Grace, if you meditate on the Lord; O humble servant of the Lord, you shall obtain the fruit of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਕਹੈ ਸੁਣਹੁ ਜਨ ਭਾਈ ਸੁਖ ਸੋਹਿਲੜਾ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kahai sunahu jan bhaaee sukh sohilarraa har dhiaavahu |1|
lines.english: Says Nanak, listen O humble Sibling of Destiny: meditate on the Lord, and find peace and pleasure. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਭੀਨੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sun har gun bheene sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Hearing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, I am intuitively drenched with His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਹਜੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramat sahaje naam dhiaae |
lines.english: Under Guru's Instruction, I meditate intuitively on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਭਉ ਭਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau dhur likhiaa tin gur miliaa tin janam maran bhau bhaagaa |
lines.english: Those who have such pre-ordained destiny, meet the Guru, and their fears of birth and death leave them.
